channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Guidance on Offering Freelance Support After Resigning
item.description: A data analyst planning to resign from a small company seeks advice on offering freelance support to ease the transition. Experts highlight the importance of timing, professionalism, and understanding...

item.title: NSW man accused of murdering partner denied bail after photos emerge
item.description: A NSW man, Jethro Gamueda, has been denied bail after being accused of murdering his partner, Summer Fleming, in a brutal assault. Court proceedings revealed that on August 17, 2025, the couple argued...

item.title: Toyota suppliers face profit pressures amid rising oil costs and Iran conflict
item.description: Japanese suppliers to Toyota, including major parts manufacturers like Aisin and Denso, are experiencing increasing uncertainty due to the ongoing conflict in Iran. Rising oil prices are driving up th...

item.title: Akhilesh Yadav visits BJP MLA injured in protest, urges harmony
item.description: On Tuesday, Samajwadi Party leader Akhilesh Yadav visited a hospital in Lucknow to check on the wellbeing of BJP MLA Anupama Jaiswal, who sustained burn injuries during a protest last week. The incide...

item.title: Veteran Tanzanian Actor Mzee Hashim Kambi Passes Away at 70
item.description: Veteran Tanzanian actor and former Yanga SC player, Mzee Hashim Kambi, passed away on April 27 while receiving treatment at MICO Hospital in Sinza, Dar es Salaam. Born on October 21, 1956, he was just...

item.title: Ekurhuleni deputy police chief and city manager granted bail over impersonation allegations
item.description: The Boksburg Magistrate’s Court granted R30 000 bail each to suspended Ekurhuleni Metropolitan Police Department deputy chief Julius Mkhwanazi and city manager Kagiso Lerutla. Both are accused of atte...

item.title: Ontario driver receives $2,500 fine for careless driving resulting in fatality of an 88-year-old pedestrian
item.description: In Bradford, Ontario, a driver, Maliha Ahmed, was fined $2,500 after striking 88-year-old Gisela Gutsche with her vehicle while Gutsche was walking with a mobility aid along Sideroad 10 on September 3...

item.title: India faces aviation fuel crisis; political tensions rise, Greece gunman attacks, Maharashtra probes lone wolf stabbing
item.description: Today’s top news highlights several critical events from India and abroad. The Federation of Indian Airlines has urgently appealed to the government to intervene in soaring aviation turbine fuel (ATF)...

item.title: Practical Guide to Locating and Managing Lost Pension Funds
item.description: With the rise of auto-enrolment and frequent job changes, many individuals in the UK have accumulated multiple pension pots, some of which have become forgotten or 'orphaned'. It is essential to locat...

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel defends age-related joke about President Trump and First Lady Melania
item.description: Comedian Jimmy Kimmel responded to criticism from former U.S. President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump regarding a joke he made about their age difference during a monologue ahead of the Wh...

item.title: Former Law Dean Advocates for Recognition of Foreign Divorce Between Filipino Citizens
item.description: Former Far Eastern University law dean Mel Sta. Maria, serving as amicus curiae, has urged the Philippine Supreme Court to recognize foreign divorce involving two Filipino citizens. Sta. Maria argued ...

item.title: A 34-Year-Old New Mother Diagnosed With Stage 4 Non-Hodgkin Lymphoma Beats 3-Month Prognosis Through Chemotherapy and Becomes a Marathon Runner
item.description: Aruna Gobalan, a 34-year-old software engineer and recent immigrant to California, was a new mother just returning from maternity leave when she began experiencing unexplained symptoms that puzzled do...

item.title: Ballarat Dental Group boosts patient bookings with local digital marketing
item.description: Ballarat Dental Group, a long-established dental practice in regional Victoria, has successfully embraced digital marketing to attract new patients, particularly after COVID-19 disrupted traditional w...

item.title: Bishop Urges Skills-Based Education to Empower Tanzanian Youth
item.description: In Bukoba, the presiding Bishop of the Evangelical Lutheran Church in Tanzania, Dr Alex Malasusa, highlighted the urgent need for Tanzania to reform its education system to focus more on practical and...

item.title: Mageta Island Sees Economic Growth and Improved Services Following Sh232 Million Solar Project
item.description: Mageta Island in Bondo, Siaya County, has undergone a major transformation with the implementation of the Sh232 million Mageta Solar Mini Grid. Previously, the island experienced darkness after sunset...

item.title: Pakistan successfully conducts training launch of Fateh-II missile
item.description: Pakistan on Tuesday successfully conducted a training launch of its indigenously developed Fateh-II missile, showcasing the country’s growing technological and defence capabilities. The launch was org...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Criticises US Claims Amid Middle East Tensions as Oil Prices Rise
item.description: Iran's foreign minister, Abbas Araghchi, openly criticised former US President Donald Trump's assertions of progress in the Middle East during a visit to Moscow, questioning why the US sought negotiat...

item.title: President Ruto Clarifies Misunderstood Remarks on English Usage Amid Response from Nigeria
item.description: President William Ruto has addressed recent remarks on English usage that went viral online, explaining they were taken out of context. Speaking at the Mining Summit in Nairobi, Ruto said he believed ...

item.title: Odisha man presents deceased sister’s remains at bank after procedural confusion
item.description: In Keonjhar district of Odisha, an Adivasi man, Jeetu Munda, resorted to an unusual and distressing action by bringing the skeletal remains of his sister, Kalra Munda, to the Maliposi branch of Odisha...

item.title: Durban's uShaka Marine World requires R22 million municipal support to maintain operations in 2026
item.description: uShaka Marine World in Durban, formally known as the Durban Marine Theme Park (DMTP), is set to receive a R22 million bailout to sustain its operations until the next municipal budget cycle. According...
